name: aiworkbench
postCreateCommand:
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && mkdir -p /root/.aws && grep -q '[profile aiworkbench]' /root/.aws/config 2>/dev/null || printf '[profile aiworkbench]
sso_start_url = https://d-9967058feb.awsapps.com/start
sso_region = eu-central-1
sso_account_id = 859551917552
sso_role_name = DeveloperAccess
sso_registration_scopes = sso:account:access
region = eu-central-1
' >> /root/.aws/config
postStartCommand: aws sts get-caller-identity --profile aiworkbench 2>/dev/null || aws sso login --profile aiworkbench; claude
